data.name: High Desire - Season One
data.detailed_description:
Born into privilege, Wayne had a life most could only dream of—wealth, status, and endless possibilities. After a sudden downfall shatters his world, he’s pulled into a hidden side of the city where temptation and ambition thrive under the cover of night. Guided by your choices, he’ll navigate a world of fast cars, dangerous alliances, and relationships that can change everything.

High Desire is an Adult Visual Novel with street racing at its core. Rival crews battle for money, dominance, and respect, where every race is a gamble and every victory a chance to prove your worth. Behind the wheel, split-second timed choices can mean the difference between glory and defeat.

Along the way, you’ll meet a diverse cast of characters who each bring their own challenges, stories, and motivations. From potential love interests to rivals and allies, every encounter will shape how you navigate both the streets and your personal life.

This game puts a strong focus on story and atmosphere. Detailed environments, cinematic storytelling, and carefully crafted sound design all work together to bring every scene to life. With original music and immersive audio, every moment feels connected to the world around you.

data.short_description: High Desire is a story-based Adult Visual Novel that follows a young man with dreams of becoming a racing driver, pulled into the adrenaline-soaked world of underground street racing. Experience his story through high-speed nights and complex relationships, where your choices shape his fate.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
